target: It seems Shin-chan just wants to save that woman no matter what.
In that case, it really does seem more fun to kill that woman first.
Heh, so in a situation like this, instead of hesitating, you're going to cling to me?
But you know, even if you cling to me with all your strength like this, it doesn't make me happy at all, you know?
(No matter how pathetic I look, I'll save Koyuba-san!)
Shin-chan... you're really in the way, you know?
See, you can't run away anymore, can you?
Wai... t...! I won't... let you!
Jeez, what is it now. Let go.
You're way too persistent, Shin-chan. Is that girl really that important to you?
Koyuba-san was trying so desperately hard for the sake of this island, you know!?
And yet...! And yet, you guys...!!
I won't let you hurt her any more than this!
Enough already. Don't say anything else.
Just lie down quietly right there. I'm going to kill that woman now.
Your legs are shaking so much you couldn't move? Even though Shin-chan tried so desperately to protect you.
What's this, a rock? You really don't know when to give up, do you.
That was probably a fatal wound just now. In the end, if you die, you can't protect anyone.
Mio-chan, let go of him! Shinpei-kun is going to die!
You're the girl Shin-chan risked his life to protect. I'll let you live until Shin-chan dies.
(Stop...! Don't lay a hand on Koyuba-san...!)
This is the final meal. Please enjoy it to your heart's content...
(A giant Shadow is spreading all over the shrine grounds...)
(The giant Shadow is spreading across the whole island...)
